meta.title: 151 | Senior Infrastructure Architecture
meta.description: Elite infrastructure design, automation, and Technical Design Authority consulting. Based in Luxembourg.

hero.subtitle: Designing resilient, scalable systems for enterprises that refuse to compromise on performance, security, or sovereignty.

standard.title: Engineering Without Compromise
standard.body: In an era defined by distributed workloads, relentless cyber threats, and rigorous compliance frameworks, rigid IT environments are a critical liability. 151 bridges the gap between legacy datacenters and dynamic, AI-driven solutions. We institute comprehensive automation ecosystems, leveraging Infrastructure as Code to guarantee repeatability, scalability, and operational resilience.

about.title: The Architect
about.subtitle: Based in Luxembourg — at the heart of Europe’s financial and technological sector.
about.bio: With deep specialization in on-premises solutions, hybrid cloud integrations, and infrastructure automation, the architect behind 151 has engineered digital foundations for some of the most demanding operational environments.
about.quote: Architecture is not about selecting the most complex technology; it is about selecting the most appropriate technology.

portfolio.title: Portfolio
portfolio.subtitle: Real-world infrastructure transformations delivered with measurable impact.

datacenter.title: Datacenter Consolidation & Hybrid Migration
datacenter.challenge: A Luxembourg-based fund administrator operated 3 aging datacenters with 400+ physical servers, facing €2.1M annual maintenance costs, 72-hour disaster recovery windows, and upcoming DORA compliance deadlines.
datacenter.architecture: Designed a hybrid architecture consolidating to 2 sites with active-active failover. Implemented VMware vSAN HCI clusters, SD-WAN backbone, and Azure Arc for hybrid management. Full Infrastructure as Code with Terraform and Ansible.
datacenter.result: 58% infrastructure cost reduction. DR window compressed from 72 hours to 4 hours. DORA compliance achieved 6 months ahead of deadline. 99.99% uptime in first year.

zerotrust.title: Zero-Trust Network Transformation
zerotrust.challenge: A pan-European insurer with 12 branch offices relied on legacy VPN-based perimeter security. Multiple penetration tests revealed lateral movement vulnerabilities, and the flat network topology posed catastrophic breach risk.
zerotrust.architecture: Implemented microsegmentation with Palo Alto Prisma, deployed identity-aware proxies replacing VPN, integrated CrowdStrike EDR with Splunk SIEM. Built automated threat response playbooks in SOAR.
zerotrust.result: Attack surface reduced by 94%. Mean time to detect threats dropped from 14 days to 23 minutes. Zero successful lateral movement in subsequent pentests. Full CSSF regulatory compliance.

mlops.title: GPU-Accelerated MLOps Platform
mlops.challenge: A quantitative trading firm needed on-premises ML training infrastructure with sub-millisecond inference latency. Cloud solutions introduced unacceptable latency and data sovereignty concerns for proprietary models.
mlops.architecture: Deployed NVIDIA DGX cluster with InfiniBand fabric, Kubernetes with GPU operator for workload orchestration, MLflow for experiment tracking, and Triton Inference Server for production serving. Air-gapped network segment with hardware security modules.
mlops.result: Model training time reduced by 12x. Inference latency under 0.3ms. Complete data sovereignty with zero cloud dependency. Platform supports 40+ concurrent training jobs.

diagnostic.title: DORA Readiness Diagnostic
diagnostic.subtitle: Assess your organization's readiness for the Digital Operational Resilience Act. This diagnostic covers the five pillars of DORA compliance.

ict1.q: Does your organization maintain a comprehensive ICT risk management framework?

ict2.q: How are ICT assets and dependencies identified and mapped?
ict2.d: Automated discovery with real-time dependency graphs

incident1.q: Do you have a defined ICT incident classification and reporting process?
incident1.d: Automated detection, classification, and regulatory reporting

incident2.q: How quickly can major ICT incidents be reported to regulators?

resilience1.q: Does your organization conduct regular digital operational resilience testing?
resilience1.d: Continuous testing with threat-led penetration testing (TLPT)

resilience2.q: How are business continuity and disaster recovery plans validated?
resilience2.c: Regular DR drills with documented results
resilience2.d: Automated failover testing with measured RTO/RPO

thirdparty1.q: How are critical ICT third-party service providers identified and monitored?
thirdparty1.c: Regular assessments and concentration risk analysis
thirdparty1.d: Continuous monitoring with exit strategies for all critical providers

thirdparty2.q: Do contractual arrangements with ICT providers include DORA-required clauses?
thirdparty2.d: Comprehensive DORA clauses with audit rights across all providers

sharing1.q: Does your organization participate in cyber threat intelligence sharing?
sharing1.d: Active contributor to threat intelligence platforms with automated indicators

sharing2.q: How are threat intelligence findings integrated into your security operations?
sharing2.c: Integrated into SIEM with correlation rules
sharing2.d: Automated threat hunting and proactive defense updates
